multi.title: Bulk Gift Reservations
multi.tooltipParent:
Enter one per line:
email,count(optional)

Example:
alice@example.com,2
bob@example.com
multi.reserveDescription: Hold each exact name until it’s received or expires.
multi.createButton: Create {count, plural, one {# Gift} other {# Gifts}}
multi.subdomainOf: Must be a single-label subdomain of {domain}
multi.confirmDescription: You are about to create {count, plural, one {# gift} other {# gifts}}. Review the entries below.

fields.yourDomainDescriptionFixed: Domain is fixed for this page
fields.yourDomainDescription: Select the Powered by Namefi domain you want to gift from
fields.recipientEmailDescription: Email address of the gift recipient
fields.giftTypeDescription: Gift a specific domain or allow recipient to choose any subdomain
fields.exactDomainNameDescription: The specific domain name to gift
fields.reserveDescription: Prevent others from claiming this exact domain until the gift expires or is received.
fields.parentNote: Parent domain will be the selected PBN domain.
fields.expirationDateDescription: When this gift expires if not claimed
fields.personalMessagePlaceholder: Add a personal message for the recipient...
fields.personalMessageDescription: Personal message to include in the gift email

toast.createdEmailSent: Gift created and email sent successfully!
toast.createdEmailFailed: Gift created successfully, but email failed to send

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
validation.exactMustEndWith: Exact domain must end with "{domain}" domain
